title: tragopogon samaritani
intro: Tragopogon samaritani, also known as Samaritan salsify or false salsify, is a plant species in the sunflower family that belongs to the genus Tragopogon. The plant's roots have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties, which have been found to aid in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tragopogon samaritani include its ability to reduce swelling and pain, as well as its use in treating urinary tract infections and skin conditions. Traditionally, the plant's roots are dried and used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions.
